title: STAT+: Health care reform might be a focus in midterms. For Congress, pursuing it will be an uphill climb
description: Lawmakers will likely have a lot to say about health care this year. Paradoxically, they probably won't accomplish much on the subject.
content: Lawmakers will likely have a lot to say about health care this year. Paradoxically, they probably won't accomplish much on the subject.
